title: STAYWARM 800w 2 Bar Quartz Heater with 2 Heat Settings / Safety Tip-over Switch / Wide Angle Heat Reflector / Carry Handle - F2102GR - Grey
features: LONG LIFE QUARTZ TUBES: Long life tubes ensure your quartz heater will be long lasting and efficient. The STAYWARM 800w 2 Bar Quartz Heater offers radiant heating using infrared waves to create and omit heat. The wide angle heat reflector allows for safe heating indoors and the intensity provided can warm both rooms and personal spaces effectively.

COMPACT DESIGN: The compact size and quiet operation makes the quartz heater ideal for the home without disturbance to your daily life. This lightweight product measures up at just H 36 x W 25 x D 15 cm and has a fold away stand for easy storage.

2 HEAT SETTINGS: The STAYWARM 800w 2 Bar Quartz Heater has 2 heat settings; 400w and 800w. Simply plug into any UK mains to switch on and set the dial to 'I' for 400w or dial 'II' for 800w; the heating element will heat up to your desired setting to warm the surrounding air temperature.

LIGHTWEIGHT WITH FOLD AWAY STAND: The heater comes with built-in integral carry handle for ease of transportation between locations and has a rotatable, collapsible stand that folds away when not in use.

SAFE TO USE: If a technical malfunction should occur, the overheat protection will disconnect the power should it become too hot. The safety tip-over switch will also cut power to the device if it's knocked over or not in the upright position as a safety feature.
